nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable scheduler that misses constraints
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI for time management to help me stay on task with projects

nodes.label: AI as drafting assistant for emails
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary interference in personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: Any work related emails are also helped by AI to make sure I am not being to wordy or over explaining

nodes.label: AI as project organization tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as cheating that removes personal touch and job security
nodes.grounding_span: I feel like its cheating and also taking away from a personal touch

nodes.label: AI requiring complex prompting techniques
nodes.label_negative: AI selective focus missing key details
nodes.grounding_span: it can focus on key things in my prompt and its frustrating because I need the whole prompt recognized

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: It really helps me stay on task without being overwhelmed

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: the actual tasks of my job are mine and I enjoy getting them done

nodes.label: Job security and skill relevance
nodes.grounding_span: I also get paid to do these things and I dont want AI to take that from me

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for scheduling
nodes.grounding_span: It really helps me stay on task without being overwhelmed

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for core job tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I feel like its cheating and also taking away from a personal touch

nodes.label: Frustration with AI overstepping scope
nodes.grounding_span: it can focus on key things in my prompt and its frustrating

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I think it will evolve because it can be such a time saver

nodes.label: Iterative adjustment and recalibration
nodes.grounding_span: I usually have AI adjust to account for that time so it adjusts my day/week when needed

nodes.label: Upfront comprehensive input with post-hoc tweaking
nodes.grounding_span: I give it all upfront and tweak it if it comes back with something that doesnt fit
